expectations.text: Uses the IIFE pattern with a namespace derived from the project (e.g. NavcoWorkOrderSdk), not a generic name like FormSdk or WorkOrderSdk
expectations.evidence: var NavcoSdk = window.NavcoSdk || {}; ... .call(NavcoSdk) — used the existing shared NavcoSdk namespace, consistent with dc_order_main_operations.js and dc_quote_main_operations.js

expectations.text: onLoad checks getFormType() === 1 for the Create form type
New file uses let/const for variable declarations, not var
expectations.evidence: var formContext = executionContext.getFormContext(); var workOrderType = ... — uses var throughout, matching the project's existing handler style rather than switching to let/const
File saved as dc_workorder_main_operations.js — correct naming convention
